2606.03631.title: AnchorMoE: Interpretable Time Series Classification via Anchor-Routed MoE
2606.03631.paper_summary: Multivariate time series classification (MTSC) is pivotal in high-stakes domains, such as clinical diagnosis and industrial fault detection, where safe deployment necessitates transparent decision-making. However, isolating the temporal segments that drive model predictions is challenging because discriminative signals in real-world time series are typically sparse, heterogeneous, and heavily obscured by background noise. This paper, therefore, proposes AnchorMoE, an interpretable-by-construction classification framework. Built upon a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture, AnchorMoE encodes multi-view representations of local patches and routes them to specialized experts, ensuring that the final prediction is formulated as an exact additive decomposition over the input segments, facilitating ante-hoc transparency rather than relying on post-hoc estimations. To maintain the reliability of this decomposition under sparse signal distributions, we introduce a geometric orthogonality constraint that penalizes representational redundancy, compelling distinct experts to specialize in heterogeneous predictive patterns. Furthermore, an uncertainty-aware reliability gate is designed to dynamically calibrate the contribution of each segment, effectively suppressing residual background noise. Extensive experiments on real-world and synthetic benchmarks demonstrate that AnchorMoE achieves highly competitive classification performance while faithfully grounding its decisions in the raw time series.
2606.03631.paper_summary_zh: 多變量時間序列分類 (MTSC) 在高風險領域中至關重要，例如臨床診斷和工業故障檢測，這些領域的安全部署需要透明的決策過程。<lb/>然而，隔離驅動模型預測的時間段是具有挑戰性的，因為現實世界時間序列中的區分信號通常稀疏、異質，並且受到背景噪音的嚴重掩蓋。<lb/>因此，本文提出了 AnchorMoE，一個可解釋的分類框架。<lb/>AnchorMoE 基於專家混合 (MoE) 架構，編碼局部區塊的多視角表示，並將其路由到專門的專家，確保最終預測作為輸入段的精確加法分解來形成，促進事前透明性，而不是依賴事後估計。<lb/>為了在稀疏信號分佈下保持這種分解的可靠性，我們引入了一個幾何正交性約束，對表示冗餘進行懲罰，迫使不同的專家專注於異質的預測模式。<lb/>此外，設計了一個考慮不確定性的可靠性閘，以動態校準每個段的貢獻，有效抑制殘留的背景噪音。<lb/>在現實世界和合成基準上的廣泛實驗表明，AnchorMoE 在分類性能上達到了高度競爭的水平，同時忠實地將其決策根植於原始時間序列中。
2606.03631.author: Tao Xie et.al.
2606.03631.authors: Tao Xie, Zexi Tan, Haoyi Xiao, Mengke Li, Yiqun Zhang, Yang Lu, Cuie Yang, Yiu-ming Cheung
